title: Retail sales prohibited
doc_html:
§4545.31.  Retail sales prohibited

The Authority shall have no power or authority right to sell or to provide for the transmission of electric power or energy at retail.

Added by Acts 1979, No. 772, §1, eff. July 20, 1979.
